delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[GL]',1,3) = 'non' and TP like 'F%'
insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, PC, BusCat, RiskTerr,ReinLoc,Amt1) (select '[batchID]-data2', Co, GL, PC, BusCat, RiskTerr,ReinLoc,Amt1  from TransX  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 <>0)

insert into TransX (KeyID, BusCatDesc, Amt1) (select '[batchID]-data3', (case when substring(GL,1,3) = '460' then 'Insurance(gross)' else 'Reinsurance(ceded)' end), round(-sum(Amt1),2)  from TransX  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co like '599%' group by substring(GL,1,3))
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co like '599%'
update TransX set RiskTerr = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and RiskTerr in ('unknown','ORIG','UNKN','UNUN','WWWW','WWUS','WWUC','WWCA')
update TransX set ReinLoc = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ReinLoc in ('unknown','ORIG','UNKN','UNUN','WWWW','WWUS','WWUC','WWCA')
update TransX set Flex6 = 'Insurance(gross)', BusCatDesc = 'Assumed', Amt1 = -Amt1, Flex9 = 'Proportional' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat < '30'
update TransX set Flex6 = 'Reinsurance(ceded)', BusCatDesc = 'Ceded', Amt1 = -Amt1, Flex9 = 'Proportional' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat >= '30'
update TransX set Flex9 = 'Non-proportional' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat in ('22','23','32','33')
update TransX set GLdesc = 'WP' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '40%'
update TransX set GLdesc = 'UPR' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '41%'
Update TransX set RiskTerr = m.Field1 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.Co like m.ID and t.RiskTerr like m.Descr and m.Table_ID = 'R48 Overrides' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Flex5 = r.Descr, Flex4 = r.Region from TransX t inner join RiskTerrs r on t.RiskTerr = r.RiskTerr where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(Flex5,'') = ''
Update TransX set Flex5 = r.Descr, Flex4 = r.Region from TransX t inner join ReinLocs r on t.ReinLoc = r.ReinLoc where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(Flex5,'') = ''

Update TransX set Flex4 = r.Region,Flex5 = r.Descr from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.Co = m.ID and m.Table_ID = 'R48 Co' inner join RiskTerrs r on m.Descr = r.RiskTerr  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(Flex5,'') = ''
Update TransX set Flex5 = 'Canada' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = 'Canada'
Update TransX set Flex4 = 'Asia' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = 'Far East'
Update TransX set Flex4 = 'United States', Flex5 = 'United States' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = 'US'
Update TransX set Flex4 = 'All other American Countries' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = 'Oth America'
Update TransX set Flex4 = 'All other American Countries', Flex5 = 'Other American Countries' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = 'Intl'
Update TransX set Flex5 = 'South Korea' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = 'Korea'
Update TransX set Flex4 = 'United States', Flex5 = 'United States' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (PC like '%ORB%' OR PC in ('2202EU0725','2202EU0STM'))

Update t set Flex5 = m.Field1 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Descr = t.Flex4 and m.Field1 like '%other%' and m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Countries' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not t.Flex5 in (Select Field1 from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'IR17' and ID = 'Countries')
Update x set Flex7 = y.Product from TransX x inner join PCtrs y on x.PC = y.PCtr where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update x set Flex7 = m.field2 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Field1 = x.Flex7 and m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'PC' and m.Descr = 'Product' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update x set Flex8 = m.field2 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Field1 = x.Co and m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'PC' and m.Descr = 'Co' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('4019900','4019901','4119900','4119901') and '[GL]' = 'non TP only'
insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, PC, BusCat, RiskTerr,ReinLoc,TP,Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
